name: Neurosoft Software Production S.A.
summary: Neurosoft Software Production S.A., a software production and ICT company, design, develops, customizes, and maintains integrated software systems in the areas of Fintech and analytics, systems engineering, and cyber security operations in Greece and internationally. The company offers Consensus For Invoice Reconciliation Management (ConFIRM), a platform that targets to alleviate all issues that accounting office's face in the process of invoice reconciliation; Proxima+, an E2E factoring and supply chain finance platform, which manages firms' receivables finance business; Angel, a cyber-security solution for maritime that addresses the cyber threat; and Illicium, a cyber-deception platform. It also provides Neutrify, a security operations center, monitors and analyzes activity on networks, servers, endpoints, databases, applications, websites, and other systems and looks for anomalous activity, as well as offers advanced forensic analysis, and malware reverse engineering to analyze incidents; RedyOps, which assists in evaluating the security of organization and helps to defend from attacks combining targets such as people, technology, and physical security; and Enterprise Link, a business connectivity service. Neurosoft Software Production S.A. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
